title: dianthus × dufftii
intro: Dianthus × dufftii, also known as Cheddar pink, is a perennial plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Dianthus × dufftii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Dianthus × dufftii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water, or used as a dried herb in capsules or tinctures.
